blocks.content: Larry crossed to the windows. Maya slid her bag off the seat before he even asked.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You're not going to let that go.
Her friend looked at Maya, then at Larry, then went back to eating. She said her name was Keisha like Larry should already know it.

blocks.speaker: Keisha
blocks.content: So how do you know Jonathan Michaels?

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: We grew up in the same neighborhood. Been friends since middle school.

blocks.speaker: Keisha
blocks.content: I'm just saying mm. That's not anything.
Across the cafeteria, Jonathan was holding court. At some point he looked up, scanned the room, found Larry — registered him sitting with Maya — and moved on. No nod. Just a read and a release.

blocks.prompt: Keisha is still watching. Maya is waiting to see what you do with that.

options.label: Turn back to Maya. Ignore Keisha.
